sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check player position and red path
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("Player position:")
for i in range(38, 50):
    row = ascii_lines[i]
    for j, c in enumerate(row):
        if c == 'b':
            print(f"  Row {i}, col {j}: b")
            break

seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'R':
        print(f"\nRed path: pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
